name: fullstack
description: Full-stack governance team-in-a-box — the union of the devops (IaC) and engineer (software) rosters under one Manager-orchestrated loop. A Manager (Alakazam) conducts intake → plan → build → review → ship-check → audit → merge-handoff and is the single voice to the human, routing each change to the right reviewers ACROSS both domains by what it touches: network, infra-security, architecture, consumer (infra) and appsec, api-contract, data-model, performance (app), plus a shared code-reviewer, red team, and ADR-amender. Deterministic hooks for both worlds (AWS write-whitelist + terraform-apply gate, protected paths for IAM/network/auth/payments/migrations/API behind review reports, human-only release/destructive commands), ADR token-cache reading both domain folders, audited auditors, and an anti-kafka charter. Per-project config: .governance.json.
